title: Backend Python Engineer
description: HealthBridge connects patients with healthcare providers through a unified API platform. We process sensitive health data at scale and take data quality and security seriously. We're looking for a Python engineer who cares about clean code, testing, and building APIs that clinical teams can depend on.
responsibilities: Build and maintain health data APIs used by 200+ NHS practices
Ensure GDPR and clinical data security standards are met
Write comprehensive test suites for critical patient data flows
Collaborate with clinical advisors to model health domain concepts
